description_long: This is a modern, single-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist rectangular layout. The exterior features clean white and gray walls, large glass windows, and a spacious patio area adjacent to a pool. The house is set on a neatly manicured green lawn, bordered by a hedge, and includes a paved driveway leading to the main entrance. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, with some large floor-to-ceiling panes and others smaller and more discrete. The main entryway is simple, with a single door and a short walkway, lacking decorative columns or overhangs. The overall design emphasizes simplicity, open space, and functional outdoor living.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with white and gray walls, large windows, and a poolside patio set on a green lawn. The design is minimalist, with clean lines and a paved driveway.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main entrance, a large window, and the pool area to the right, with a hedge-lined lawn.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the pool, patio, and extensive glass windows, as well as the sloped driveway.
description_view_2: Rear view displays multiple windows, the back door, and the full length of the driveway.
description_view_3: Opposite side view reveals a secondary entrance, a long blank wall, and the walkway leading to the door.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Simple single-door entry with a short walkway, no porch or decorative elements
